source.title: Synergistic effects of konjac glucomannan and curdlan on the qualities and starch digestibility of extruded gluten-free rice pasta

mapping_notes: Direct mapping to high-amylose rice flour. Paper reports water absorption as M2/M1*100; stored water_absorption_pct is converted to net uptake by subtracting 100.

source.title: Synergistic effects of konjac glucomannan and curdlan on the qualities and starch digestibility of extruded gluten-free rice pasta

mapping_notes: KGM was 6% on starch basis. Rice flour starch was 78.16%, then formula was normalized over solids. Water absorption converted from M2/M1*100 to net uptake.

source.title: Synergistic effects of konjac glucomannan and curdlan on the qualities and starch digestibility of extruded gluten-free rice pasta

mapping_notes: KGM was 6% and CUD was 1% on starch basis. Rice flour starch was 78.16%, then formula was normalized over solids. Water absorption converted from M2/M1*100 to net uptake.

source.title: Synergistic effects of konjac glucomannan and curdlan on the qualities and starch digestibility of extruded gluten-free rice pasta

mapping_notes: KGM was 6% and CUD was 2% on starch basis. Rice flour starch was 78.16%, then formula was normalized over solids. Water absorption converted from M2/M1*100 to net uptake.

source.title: Synergistic effects of konjac glucomannan and curdlan on the qualities and starch digestibility of extruded gluten-free rice pasta

mapping_notes: KGM was 6% and CUD was 3% on starch basis. Rice flour starch was 78.16%, then formula was normalized over solids. Water absorption converted from M2/M1*100 to net uptake.

source.title: Preparation of gluten-free rice spaghetti with soy protein isolate using twin-screw extrusion

mapping_notes: CNT1 high-amylose rice flour mapped to High-amylose rice flour; RD6 waxy rice flour mapped to Sweet rice flour (Mochiko). Water adsorption index is retained as reported but not used as water_absorption_pct because its scale differs strongly from Liu/Lux.

source.title: Preparation of gluten-free rice spaghetti with soy protein isolate using twin-screw extrusion

mapping_notes: CNT1 high-amylose rice flour mapped to High-amylose rice flour; RD6 waxy rice flour mapped to Sweet rice flour (Mochiko); SPI direct mapped. Water adsorption index retained as reported but not used as water_absorption_pct.
